filter_reason: Primary post for a new OpenAI voice model generation - a multimodal capability release from a major player.
summary: OpenAI introduced GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models now powering ChatGPT Voice, aimed at more natural real-time human-AI conversation. Voice model generations matter because latency and naturalness are the gating factors for spoken assistants and phone-style agents. This resets OpenAI's speech stack alongside the GPT-5.6 launch.
title: Introducing GPT-Live
excerpt: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.
